name: GIGABYTE B650M DS3H Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Q-FLASH PLUS Button
shortName: GIGABYTE B650M DS3H Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 socket with DDR5 support and PCIe 4.0 for budget-conscious Ryzen builders.
